## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard GrowthX Labs to Hofy's platform for managing employee equipment and orders across multiple countries.](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs is on Hofy's entry tier ($820/year) for up to 50 devices on 2 teams](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Initial orders planned for India, Serbia, Macedonia, and Pakistan; potential interest in MDM later](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Platform walkthrough covered key features: dashboard, settings, permissions, billing, catalog management, and team member onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Next steps involve Molly adding team member details and placing initial equipment orders](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Topics

### Account Setup and Billing

  - [Entry tier: $820/year, 50 devices, 2 teams, basic SSO/HRIS integrations](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [One-year contract, zero commitment on spend beyond platform fee](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Invoicing: Platform fee annually, other charges monthly (net 30 terms)](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Billing in USD; first invoice due next week](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)

### Platform Overview

  - [Dashboard: Quick access to orders, team member management, asset tracking](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [New joiner widget: Tracks equipment needs for upcoming starts](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Permissions: Tiered structure (Access, Finance, Manage, PII)](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Catalog management: Country-specific filtering, approval process](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Team structure: Suggested tech/non-tech split for different equipment needs](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)

### Order Process and Equipment Management

  - [Catalog browsing and approval within team settings](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Flexible options for rental/purchase, warranty, and support packages](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Order placement workflow demonstrated](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
  - [Asset tracking for Hofy-provided and company-owned equipment](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)

### Team Member Management

  - [Adding new team members (demonstrated with "Becerra")](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Importance of both work and personal email for communication](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [Off-boarding process for departing employees](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)

### Support and Resources

  - [Support team available nearly 24/5 across global regions](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - In-platform chat and email (<support@hofy.com>) for assistance
  - [Help center and documentation accessible through platform](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Molly to gather and input address details for team member "Becerra"](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Complete equipment selection and place initial order for Becerra](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Consider setting up tech and non-tech teams if needed](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Explore and set up HR integration if using a compatible system (e.g., Remote)](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Review and approve items in the product catalog for relevant countries](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Optional: Set up direct debit for automatic invoice payments](https://fathom.video/share/WfAxdFjxaQvvZvtPsQ1oY9gA_tTRyXZD?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
